user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new checklist question, so that pre-joining checklists capture the required information
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the CheckList Questionnaire screen; When I click Add new question and provide the question details; Then the question is created and shown in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to define a value and mark a question as mandatory, so that candidates must respond to essential items
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a checklist question; When I enter a Value and set Mandatory; Then I can Save and the setting is applied

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view questions with their response from, question type, field type and display type, so that I can review the checklist configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given questions exist; When I open the CheckList Questionnaire list; Then each question shows Response from, Question type, Field type and Question display type

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the questionnaire list, so that I see the latest configured questions
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the CheckList Questionnaire screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to close the question form without saving, so that I can discard unwanted changes
acceptance_criteria: Given I am editing a checklist question; When I click Close or Cancel; Then the form closes without saving changes
